text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way home with Hishi Akebono after a
day out when the topic of the ceramics workshop
we attended comes up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I booked a second session for us! I only got to
finish the design last time, but this time, I'm going
to actually make the pot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Ehehe! I wonder what kind of chanko I
should make in it when it's done? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's our second lesson and, after learning the
basics, Hishi Akebono gets started on the pottery
wheel. She messes up before long though, and
repeats the same mistakes over and over.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Break time!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Turning the clay is a lot harder than I thought. It
looked easy, but getting the pressure and
motions right is super tricky!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's shaping up better than when I first
started. I bet the more I practice, the closer I'll
get to creating my perfect pot!
choice_data_list:
You don't let anything get you down, huh,
Akebono?

You don't let anything get you down, huh,
Akebono?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's there to be down about? Practice
makes perfect, and I'm getting better and better
the more I try! I don't have time to get upset!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, break time's over! Time to get back to
work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We don't get as far as firing Hishi Akebono's pot,
so that'll have to wait until next time. The
following day...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Please, lend me your aid!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, what's wrong? I'll do whatever I can to
help!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Thank you! I've got a crisis situation on
my hands!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I... I have to prepare a lunch in time for
tomorrow's field trip!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Field trip? I didn't know there was a field trip
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
There is! Not for us, but you see, I have a friend
whose kid...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I see... So the parents are too busy... We've got to
get that packed lunch prepped!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
As an ally of justice, I cannot simply stand by and
do nothing! But I'm terrible at cooking, so there's
no way I can put a decent lunch together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You just leave this to me, Biko! I'll teach you
everything you need to know!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oho! I owe you my very life, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Aaah! I burned the eggs again! And the salmon's
completely disintegrated!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! Just cut off the burnt bits and mix the
rest in with the rice!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Gah! My hand slipped and I dumped a heap of
sugar onto the meat!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Prepping the meat with sugar helps tenderize it,
so you're doing great! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono helps and reassures Biko Pegasus
every step along the way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The food she makes is perfectly fine, but after
making so many mistakes in a row, Biko Pegasus
is starting to look a little glum.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Guh! This is no easy foe! My apologies, I'm very
bad at this!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think you're doing fine! ☆ We had to make
changes to a few of our dishes, but they still came
out yummy!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But if I keep making so many mistakes, I doubt I'll
be able to pull this off tomorrow... At this rate,
my lunch will be terrible!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You'll be okay, don't worry! We still have time,
and besides, everyone makes mistakes when they
try something new.
choice_data_list: Did you used to make mistakes too?
You had to practice a lot too, huh?
You had to practice a lot too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You'll be okay, don't worry! We still have time,
and besides, everyone makes mistakes when they
try something new.
choice_data_list: Did you used to make mistakes too?
You had to practice a lot too, huh?
You had to practice a lot too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I messed up a lot before I was finally
able to do things right.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I only managed to get this far because I never
gave up! You've got to keep it up too, Biko! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I get it now! It's the same as being an ally of
justice... You mustn't give up! YES! I'm gonna
keep practicing hard!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, the next morning, Biko Pegasus puts
the packed lunch together without issue. And so,
the crisis is solved and I come away knowing
where Hishi Akebono's resilience and
determination come from.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I did! I practiced more times than I could even
count! And when I was a kid, I messed up way
more times than I got it right.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
But I kept trying because I wanted to eat tasty
food, and I knew that would be the prize waiting
for me at the end of my grueling journey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... Some foes cannot easily be bested. But
it is a hero's duty to stand against them in bitter
battle again and again until they are beaten!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly right! Let's keep it up! I'll give you
all the help you need! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear that with Hishi Akebono's help, Biko
Pegasus manages to pack the lunch without issue.
The crisis is resolved, and I come away having
learned the power of resilience and
determination.
